title: Application for Copyright Clearance on Health Canada Works - Canada.ca
content:
## Application for Copyright Clearance on Health Canada Works
The material on the Health Canada website is covered by the provisions of the Copyright Act , by Canadian laws, policies, regulations and international agreements. Such provisions serve to identify the information source and, in specific instances, to prohibit reproduction of materials without written permission.
To submit your request for copyright permission, please complete the following form. The personal information you provide is collected to allow Health Canada to evaluate your request and to inform you of the decision. This personal information is protected under the Federal Privacy Act . Accordingly, it will be used, retained and disclosed for the purpose mentioned above only. Learn more about our commitment to privacy .
If you prefer to submit your request through mail or fax or if would like to obtain information concerning copyright ownership and restrictions on reproduction on this site, please contact:
Publishing and Copyright Officer Distribution Centre Marketing and Creative Services Health Canada 70 Colombine Driveway Basement Floor - Room 0120C Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9 Telephone: 613-960-0625 Facsimile: 613-941-5366 E-Mail: Pubsadmin@hc-sc.gc.ca
Please note that this form applies to Health Canada works only, and that all fields marked by an asterisk (*) must be completed.
